name: Offutt AFB
profile: Military-friendly Offutt AFB housing snapshot anchored to Bellevue / Papillion / Omaha, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

market_metrics.market_type_summary: Steady demand; prices in Bellevue and Papillion are consistently growing.

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Nebraska VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near Offutt.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate; higher property taxes typical for Nebraska

crime_status.installation: High security; gated military community. Extremely safe.
crime_status.metro_omaha_bellevue: Bellevue is considered one of the safest cities in Nebraska; Omaha crime is localized to specific central districts.

school_quality.on_base: None; residents attend Bellevue Public Schools.
school_quality.off_base: Bellevue and Papillion-La Vista school districts are top-rated and very popular with military families.

rental_vacancy.notes: Healthy supply; many newer apartment complexes in Papillion and Bellevue.

rental_metrics.notes: Healthy supply; many newer apartment complexes in Papillion and Bellevue.

special_events: Offutt Defenders of Freedom Air Show

military_lifestyle_fit.description: Home of USSTRATCOM; high-visibility mission with immense community support and low cost of living.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: Stable market with high equity potential; Papillion offers the best long-term resale value.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Papillion and Shadow Lake area are high-demand growth corridors.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Inventory is steady; pricing remains resilient due to the high density of military and tech jobs.

summary_points: Offutt Air Force Base sits in the Bellevue / Papillion / Omaha housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 3.1% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
Stable market with high equity potential; Papillion offers the best long-term resale value.
Neighborhood quality varies across Bellevue, Papillion, Gretna and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Inventory is steady; pricing remains resilient due to the high density of military and tech jobs.
opportunities: Offutt military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Bellevue and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Offutt.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Bellevue / Papillion / Omaha market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Stretching beyond a safe housing ratio can reduce PCS flexibility.
buyer_notes: Offutt buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Papillion and Shadow Lake area are high-demand growth corridors.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Offutt can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Offutt.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Offutt.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

market.market_type_summary: Steady demand; prices in Bellevue and Papillion are consistently growing.

base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Offutt AFB is home to USSTRATCOM and supports intelligence, reconnaissance, and strategic mission operations in the Omaha metro.
base_profile.pcs_personality: Home of USSTRATCOM; high-visibility mission with immense community support and low cost of living.
base_profile.base_bluf: Inventory is steady; pricing remains resilient due to the high density of military and tech jobs.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near Offutt.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Bellevue.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for Offutt clients — not generic Bellevue / Papillion / Omaha stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Offutt is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

commute_intelligence.commute_bluf: For Offutt, gate access and traffic timing often matter more than straight-line distance.
primary_commute_factors: Shift schedule or early report time

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Offutt housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Offutt, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to Offutt should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

school_guidance.school_zone_warning: Always verify school assignment by exact address before signing a lease or purchase contract.
school_guidance.nearby_school_district_note: Bellevue and Papillion-La Vista school districts are top-rated and very popular with military families.
school_guidance.school_liaison_note: Use official school liaison resources where available for military school transition support.

childcare_guidance.cdc_note: Child Development Center availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified directly with official base resources.
childcare_guidance.youth_program_note: Youth programs and school-age care can materially affect family housing decisions.

medical_guidance.primary_medical_anchor: Offutt Air Force Base medical services
medical_guidance.medical_warning: Verify clinic availability, pharmacy procedures, and emergency care options directly with official medical sources.

family_readiness.spouse_employment_note: The broader Bellevue / Papillion / Omaha metro may offer spouse employment options, but commute, childcare, and credentialing should be considered together.

before_arrival: Verify official gate and Visitor Control Center hours.
Confirm sponsor contact and unit reporting instructions.
Confirm lodging or temporary housing plan.
Review housing office guidance before signing any lease or purchase contract.
Compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, and debt.
Shortlist neighborhoods by likely gate and commute band.
Verify school zones by exact property address.
first_week: Visit or contact the housing office if still deciding between on-base and off-base options.
Drive the commute from target neighborhoods during expected report time.
Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

pcs_watchouts.title: Gate hours can change
pcs_watchouts.message: Use official Offutt Air Force Base gate pages before travel or commute planning.

pcs_watchouts.title: Distance is not the same as commute
pcs_watchouts.message: Neighborhoods should be compared by realistic gate access and traffic timing.

pcs_watchouts.title: School zones are address-specific
pcs_watchouts.message: Never assume a school assignment from neighborhood name alone.

pcs_watchouts.title: BAH is not the full affordability picture
pcs_watchouts.message: Users must compare rent or mortgage against income, debt, expenses, utilities, and savings goals.

pcs_watchouts.title: Property taxes and insurance shape true payment
pcs_watchouts.message: In this market, taxes (~2.15%) and insurance assumptions must be included in all-in comparisons.

base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited is not an official DoD source. This Base tab is intended for public-facing PCS orientation, housing research, and relocation planning. Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This Offutt AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Bellevue / Papillion / Omaha is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
